key_learnings: Many users have preventable micronutrient deficiencies addressable through targeted supplementation.
research_findings: Vitamin D and magnesium deficiencies are the most prevalent across diverse user demographics.
current_focus_areas: Correlating blood biomarker data with dietary intake to generate evidence-based supplement recommendations.
